caption: A screen recording captures a digital presentation of a causal loop diagram on a black background. The diagram consists of green text labels connected by curved blue arrows, illustrating a system of relationships. Legible labels include "Attractiveness of Garden," "Birds at Food," "Unsightly Goats," and "Buy Bird deterrent." Red dashed arrows also connect several elements, such as "Frustrate" and "deter." A man wearing a dark hat is visible in a small video inset at the top center of the screen, though he remains relatively still across the sequence. The browser interface is visible at the top, showing tabs and a URL from "blackboard.com." As the video progresses, a white mouse cursor moves across the screen, eventually hovering over the label "Scares" in the lower center of the diagram, while the overall layout of the system map remains static.
